filters.labelIds: ={{ (() => { const scope = ($json.mailboxScope ?? 'default'); if (scope === 'all_mail') return undefined; if (scope === 'sent') return ['SENT']; if (scope === 'drafts') return ['DRAFT']; if (scope === 'trash') return ['TRASH']; if (scope === 'spam') return ['SPAM']; return ['INBOX']; })() }}
